title: Riverwalk Reset
summary: A low-cost walking loop with room for photos, water breaks, and a short reflection stop.

title: Campus Hidden History
summary: A self-guided campus route that turns familiar buildings into a short research scavenger hunt.

title: Mural Photo Walk
summary: A creative route for collecting reference photos, color palettes, and composition ideas.

title: Coffee Code Sprint
summary: A focused two-hour work block with a drink budget, a short checklist, and one deliverable.

title: Sunset Trail Notes
summary: A longer trail session for sketching, route notes, and a calmer end-of-day reset.

title: Maker Night
summary: A hands-on build session for a small prototype, craft, or class demo artifact.

title: Budget Bites Tour
summary: A light food crawl planned around a strict budget and easy walking distances.

title: Service Hour Builder
summary: A planning block for finding, contacting, and completing a service opportunity.
